replies.msg: 感情台台主?

My friend Paul is a Gemini whereas his wife is a Leo. Last week he married Clara, his girlfriend from high school. A pastor married them at Rosewood Hotel. I said "wishing you a lifetime of love and happiness" My elder brother wrote "best wishes on this wonderful journey as you build your new lives together!" My younger brother wrote "Thank you for letting me share in this joyful day! I wish you all the best as you embark on this wonderful union!" My sister wrote "congratulations on finding each other! Your greatest adventure has just begun!" My cousin said "wishing you fulfillment of every dream!" Paul honours his parents and is thankful for what they've done for him. His sister is also a good daughter while his brother needs to be a better son. In the wast parents and teachers stress the importance of filial piety which means chinese parental respect. They teach that you should honoir your parents and take care of them. Recently paul's cousin stole his watchstrap. It became a point of honour to tell him about it. My brother was honour bound to tell him too. His dad is a man of honour and great integrity. Both paul and I are kickboxing fans. In April Fred will be fighting chris for the honour of his country. Winning the championship is a matter of personal honor, family honour and national honour. Last month his church held a feast in honour of fred. Paul asked whether I would do him the honour of accompanying him to the feast which I did. It was a signal honour to meet fred. When he saw us he said humbly "it's a great honour to have you here Paul" We asked him if he would do us the honour of being our sambo coach. He said "I'll see" The waitresses did the honours and greeted the guests at the door. After we sat down fred said to the waiter "will you do the honours and cut us a piece of chicken?" Fred said to us "I would be honoured if you could come and see my fight in april" We gave him an affirmative response. Last year the chairman said to him "I would be honoured if you attended the hall of fame ceremony" which he did. He was honoured for his performance in his last fight. Besides winning the championship he was honoured with an award for excellence in wrestling. By the way many people bought front row tickets for the next kickboxing event at half price ot less due to a computer error but the organisation stated they would honour these tickets nevertheless which could cost over five hundred thousand dollars in lost earnings. I've read in the newspapers that some customers were promised to get their money back.if they weren't happy about the products but later they found out they'd been sold down the river as they have been unable to contact the swindler to date. The scammer didn't honour the contracts.
